title: Frontrow SMP Official Modpack
description: the official modpack for the Frontrow smp
body:
**Frontrow SMP - Official Modpack**

Frontrow SMP is a lore based server where you can become your own hero (or villain)
this modpack includes:
**Fsang18's Heropack**
**Unorthadox**
**and Alienevo**

we have events almost everyday so join our discord to stay notified!
